# Sip & Scroll

> Sip & Scroll is a doomscroll blocker and hydration app for iOS. It adds a gentle friction layer before opening addictive apps — take a sip of water, snap a selfie, then enjoy up to 45 minutes of intentional scrolling.

## App

- [Download on the App Store](https://apps.apple.com/us/app/sip-scroll-app-blocker/id6748373872): Free to download. Premium: $2.99/week with 3-day trial or $24.99 lifetime.

## Blog

- [What is Doomscrolling?](https://sipandscroll.app/blog/what-is-doomscrolling.html): Understanding doomscrolling — why it happens and how to break the cycle with intentional habits.
- [7 Best App Blockers for iPhone in 2026](https://sipandscroll.app/blog/best-app-blockers-iphone.html): Tested and ranked — the top iPhone app blockers from nuclear lockouts to gentle nudges.
- [Digital Minimalism: A Practical Guide](https://sipandscroll.app/blog/digital-minimalism-guide.html): A practical digital minimalism framework for people who live online, including the 30-day declutter.
- [Is TikTok Giving You ADHD, or Is It Just Brain Rot?](https://sipandscroll.app/blog/tiktok-adhd-brain-rot.html): The neuroscience behind TikTok brain rot, pseudo-ADHD symptoms from short-form video, and how to reclaim your attention span.
- [Cold Turkey Blocker Review: Is the Nuclear Option Worth It?](https://sipandscroll.app/blog/cold-turkey-blocker-review.html): Honest review of the strictest desktop distraction blocker — Frozen Turkey, free vs pro, and who should use it.
- [How to Do a 30-Day Digital Declutter](https://sipandscroll.app/blog/30-day-digital-declutter.html): Step-by-step guide to a 30-day digital declutter — weekly phases from withdrawal to intentional reintroduction.
- [The Link Between High Screen Time and Morning Anxiety](https://sipandscroll.app/blog/screen-time-and-anxiety.html): The science behind how morning phone use hijacks your cortisol awakening response and raises baseline anxiety throughout the day.
- [Instagram Reels Compulsion: Why You Can't Stop Swiping](https://sipandscroll.app/blog/instagram-reels-addiction.html): The psychology behind Instagram Reels addiction — variable-ratio reinforcement, dopamine loops, and how to break compulsive swiping.
- [Sip & Scroll vs. Opal: Which Screen Time App Is Right for You?](https://sipandscroll.app/blog/sip-and-scroll-vs-opal.html): Head-to-head comparison of Opal's hard lockout approach versus Sip & Scroll's gentle friction model — and how to choose based on your psychology.

## Key Features

- Hydration-gated app access: take a sip of water before opening blocked apps
- Selfie verification prevents cheating without feeling punitive
- 45-minute timed sessions create natural stopping points
- Works with any app: TikTok, Instagram, YouTube Shorts, etc.
- Not a hard blocker — gentle friction, not a wall
